Since Global Financial Crisis (GFC), amid lingering recession that intensified pressure from shareholders, companies devising corporate social responsibility (CSR) models that more aligned with their core business goals services. example, blue-chip companies, such Visa Unilever, creating markets developing world closely aligning social causes with their overarching corporate strategies. strong role play provision information risk management purposes. Being socially responsible means only fulfilling legal expectations, also going beyond compliance investing more into human capital, environment, relations with stakeholders" (CEC 2001) above definition also consistent with definition provided World Business Council Sustainable Development: "The commitment business contribute sustainable economic development, working with employees, their families, local community, society large improve their quality life" (Holme Watts, 2000),
main pillars sustainability include environmental, social, economic sustainability. Social environmental performance affect organization's future reputation, brands, ability attract talented staff maintain consumer public support (CPA Australia, 2015a). Milton Friedman, noted economist, argued that primary responsibility managers maximize shareholder wealth. However, director senior manager believes that acting exclusive benefit shareholders will lead long-term success satisfactory corporate governance mistaken. often forgotten that Friedman also mentioned that this pursuit shareholder wealth should "within rules".
real world, ignoring stakeholders' interests will result poor performance could even result corporate bankruptcy. Based Stakeholder Theory, organization's success depends successful management relationships that organization with stakeholders. These stakeholders include just shareholders (for corporate entities), also other parties could affected operations entity, such employees, competitors, customers, suppliers, lenders, government, community, environment. Paying attention broad range stakeholders important from moral ethical perspective survival firm depends management range relationships.
This research contributes stakeholders' comprehensive ability regards corporate accountability. attitude manager towards interacts with emotional tendency expressed financial report.
